what-we-do.title: Professional IT & AI Training
what-we-do.heading:
The Future Runs on AI - 
Secure Your Place Now!
what-we-do.subheading: We offer seminars that help you master IT, digital tools and AI. Whether you're just starting out or want to develop further, we support you.

card1.title: Learn Modern Tech Stack
card1.description: Our IT seminars offer practice-oriented learning from experts from practice with the latest technologies like Docker, Kubernetes and React.js. You learn IT concepts and tools directly through application and exercises to immediately develop valuable skills that are applicable in the real world
points: The State of the Art, latest technology

card2.title: Learn and Apply AI - Learn by Doing!
card2.description: Our AI training offers practice-oriented learning from experts who use AI in everyday life and in real projects. You learn how to integrate AI directly into your business processes, from basics like creating your own agents to automating workflows and developing and ensuring your own AI systems.
points: Develop and deploy your own AI systems

offers.title: IT Seminars
offers.description: Dive into the world of web and mobile development with our IT seminars. Gain expertise in popular frameworks like React and Node.js, and explore the latest cloud technologies. Our sessions are designed to give you a strong foundation and practical skills to tackle real-world challenges.

offers.title: Digital Transformation & AI
offers.description: Unlock the potential of AI and digital tools to revolutionize your business. Our seminars cover everything from implementing automation and machine learning to analyzing data effectively. Learn how to leverage these technologies to improve efficiency and drive innovation in your organization.

section.title: Professional IT & AI Training
section.description: We offer seminars that help you master IT, digital tools and AI. Whether you're just starting out or want to develop further, we support you.
